calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Natosha Delucce, self-represented plaintiff appearing on her own behalf. At the request of plaintiff in pro per, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Continued To May-21-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to May-21-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: NEWTON LAM; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-19-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Continued To Jan-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Continued To Dec-26-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-24-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joseph Androvich, Esq. 916-449-1300 of Brelsford, Androvich & White for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

BRELSFORD, ANDROVICH & WHITE AND ATTORNEY JOSEPH ANDROVICH'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF NATOSHA DELUCCE.

Granted. Mr. Androvich to submit a complete and accurate proposed order on the required judicial Council form that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, Maria.Torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
The Law Firm of Brelsford, Androvich & White's Motion to be relieved as counsel for the PLAINTIFF NATOSHA DELUCCE is Off calendar. The moving attorney failed to file a proof of service with the court and did not provide a courtesy copy of the motion as required by SF Local Rule 2.7B. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/ac
